description: Draft → Submitted → Approved workflow exported as PROV-O JSON-LD. Asserts the Facts-tier graph shape required by Semantic Profile §§5.3, §5.5, §5.6, §6.5: every prov:Activity carries @id, @type=prov:Activity, wos:actionType, and (for stamped records) prov:atTime + wos:definitionVersion; state-transition activities with resolved inputs/outputs link to prov:Entity siblings via prov:used / prov:generated; the first input/output entity carries wos:inputDigest / wos:outputDigest (sha256 hex); the Human-declared actor yields an Agent whose @type is the §5.5 array [prov:Person, wos:HumanAgent]; and the §6.5 Facts-tier filter keeps narrative/reasoning/counterfactual records out of the default export. Kernel and event sequence are defined once in tests/export_conformance.rs (shared_workflow_kernel / shared_workflow_events).
